diff:
diff --git a/doc/rest_docs.go b/doc/rest_docs.go
index 4901ca9..5663e53 100644
--- a/doc/rest_docs.go
+++ b/doc/rest_docs.go
@@ -77,6 +77,13 @@ func GenReSTCustom(cmd *cobra.Command, w io.Writer, linkHandler func(string, str
        buf.WriteString(name + "\n")
        buf.WriteString(strings.Repeat("-", len(name)) + "\n\n")
        buf.WriteString(short + "\n\n")
+
+       if len(cmd.Deprecated) > 0 {
+               buf.WriteString("Deprecated\n")
+               buf.WriteString("~~~~~~~~~~\n\n")
+               buf.WriteString(cmd.Deprecated + "\n\n")
+       }
+
        buf.WriteString("Synopsis\n")
        buf.WriteString("~~~~~~~~\n\n")
        buf.WriteString("\n" + long + "\n\n")
diff --git a/site/content/user_guide.md b/site/content/user_guide.md
index d339185..494ecd1 100644
--- a/site/content/user_guide.md
+++ b/site/content/user_guide.md
@@ -819,6 +819,10 @@ Run 'kubectl help' for usage.
 Cobra can generate documentation based on subcommands, flags, etc.
 Read more about it in the [docs generation documentation](docgen/_index.md).
 
+When a command has its `Deprecated` field set, all doc output formats
+(Markdown, reStructuredText, man page, YAML) include a deprecation notice
+section with the deprecation message, placed before the synopsis section.
+
 ## Generating shell completions

solve_notes: Added a `Deprecated` section (reST underline with `~~~~~~~~~~`) to `GenReSTCustom` in `doc/rest_docs.go`, placed between the command title and Synopsis section, rendered only when `cmd.Deprecated` is non-empty. Also added a note to `site/content/user_guide.md` documenting that the `Deprecated` field is rendered across all doc output formats.
task_text:
Fix reStructuredText doc generator not rendering Deprecated field

When a command has its `Deprecated` field set, the reStructuredText doc
generator in `doc/rest_docs.go` omits the deprecation notice entirely.
`GenReSTCustom` renders Synopsis, Examples, Options, and SEE ALSO
sections but never checks `cmd.Deprecated`. Fix `GenReSTCustom` to
include a "Deprecated" section with the deprecation message when the
field is set, placed before the Synopsis section. Also update
`site/content/user_guide.md` to document the deprecation notice
rendering across all doc output formats.

relevant_preexisting_tests.reason: Calls GenReST which delegates to GenReSTCustom, covering the changed section-writing code path
Also calls GenReST which delegates to GenReSTCustom

test_selection.test_query: Find tests that verify the behavior of GenReSTCustom and GenReST in doc/rest_docs.go

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum_sufficient set contains only GenReSTCustom (the edited function). thrash_preventing is empty because the change is a simple conditional block inserted in a sequential write function, with no callers, interfaces, or configuration that an agent needs to check first.
